args.Description: "Add inline background-image to map container in app.js."
args.Instruction: "Add style=\"background-image: url('images/cyber_world_map.png');\" inline to the cyber-map-container div."
args.ReplacementContent: "            <!-- マップコンテナ -->\n            <div class=\"cyber-map-container\" id=\"map-3d-container\" style=\"background-image: url('images/cyber_world_map.png');\">\n                <svg viewBox=\"0 0 1000 1000\" class=\"cyber-world-map\" id=\"map-hotspots-svg\">"
args.TargetContent: "            <!-- マップコンテナ -->\n            <div class=\"cyber-map-container\" id=\"map-3d-container\">\n                <svg viewBox=\"0 0 1000 1000\" class=\"cyber-world-map\" id=\"map-hotspots-svg\">"
